title.en: At this moment, many geniuses had already enter...

content.en:
"Ancestral medicine!"

Ye Tian was also moved, this is a real treasure, comparable to ordinary holy relics, and it is of great help to improve strength, for many geniuses, ancestral medicine is more precious than holy relics.

After all, some holy relics are useless to themselves, but ancestral medicine is useful to everyone, and it is a scarce resource.

For example, the Dark Sanctuary doesn't have much ancestral medicine, at least it won't be provided to the Guiyi Realm.

Whoa!!!

A genius from the Dark Destruction Domain rushed into the place where the ancestral medicine was and fought for the ancestral medicine.

The realm formed by the ancestral medicine is very constrained, and there is no way to shuttle through the space, so everyone must fly in honestly, and the scope of the domain is also very large, and it takes a little time to get close to the ancestral medicine.

Besides, the ancestral medicine is rooted here, and it will take some time to take it away.

If the strength is not good, even if you are the first to enter the ancestral medicine realm, there is no way to take the ancestral medicine.

At this moment, many geniuses had already entered the ancestral medicine realm.

"The ancestral medicine is my Holy Son, whoever robs me is looking for death!"

The Holy Son of Annihilation was dressed in black armor and killed one evil genius after another with a single punch.

These evil geniuses are supposed to belong to the Destruction Holy Clan, but in fact, when they enter here, who cares whose identity?

As a genius of destroying the Holy Clan, the Holy Son of Annihilation even killed his own clansmen, not to mention that these people of the evil clan naturally killed them according to them.

When some of the evil geniuses saw the Holy Son of Annihilation, they were intimidated one by one, and they didn't dare to snatch the ancestral medicine.

Even those geniuses who were very close to the ancestral medicine, when they saw the Holy Son of Desolation coming, they immediately turned around and ran, not daring to covet this ancestral medicine anymore.

If you face other evil geniuses or destroy the geniuses of the Holy Clan, you basically can't beat them, and you have hope of escaping.

But in the face of the Son of Desolation, they could not escape.

Although the Holy Son of Annihilation is not a Holy Gifter, he is one of the Holy Endovers, and he can be called an invincible existence, and his strength is equivalent to that of the Eternal Yuan Holy Son of the Dark Sacred Domain, and his status in the Dark Destruction Domain is very high.

As long as it is not a saint-endowed, everyone is afraid of destroying the Son.

Therefore, even if they snatch the ancestral medicine, they will not be able to live, it is better to give up the ancestral medicine and leave, so that at least they can save their lives.

Wow!

The Holy Son of Desolation came to the ancestral medicine, and he was about to pick this ancestral medicine immediately.

This time, not many of the Holy Endowments came here, after all, those Holy Endowments were all of high status, with fathers of the Supreme Domain Ancestral Level, and they were not worried about resources, so they were not very interested in ancestral medicines, let alone these holy medicines and semi-holy medicines.

As a result, most of the Saints have gone elsewhere, and only a few have been here.

"Hurry up and pick it up, even if those few Holy Endowments come over, it's too late. Once this ancestral medicine falls into my hands, they won't kill me, right?"

The Holy Son of Annihilation thought to himself.

After all, he is not an ordinary genius, he has a very high status in the clan, and the Holy Endowed can kill ordinary geniuses, but if he kills, it will not be easy to explain when he goes back.

Unless it is a place where no one is around, they dare to kill themselves.

But here, there are not only members of their Destruction Holy Clan, but also the geniuses of the Three Thousand Evil Clans, who would dare to kill him openly?

"No one dares to kill me, this ancestral medicine must be mine!"

The Holy Son of Desolation thought to himself.

Just as he was picking the ancestral medicine, he suddenly sensed the crisis.

"Dangerous!"

The Son of Desolation had the idea.

Wow!

The defensive domain weapon on his body was opened, and a life-saving secret treasure was also opened in an instant.

At the same time, he performed a defensive domain technique.

As the Destruction Saint Clan, it is very difficult to create domain techniques, after all, they are not cultivators, and they don't need to comprehend anything, but the Destruction Saint Clan still has a lot of domain art inheritance.

They are also not afraid of the compatibility between the domain technique and their own forbidden dao, because their cultivation promotion does not need to rely on the forbidden dao or anything at all, they can rely on the bloodline to grow, as long as they continue to destroy, devour and kill, they can grow.

If they slaughtered a realm, it would be better than countless years of penance.

Of course, devouring holy medicine and ancestral medicine can also greatly improve cultivation.

The Holy Son of Annihilation has cultivated a lot of domain techniques, and there are no less than five defensive domain techniques, anyway, it has no effect on himself, so he can practice casually.

Moreover, his attainments in defensive secret techniques are also very high, and one of the defensive domain techniques has reached the consummation realm.

However, no matter how strong he is, he is far from being an enemy opponent.

Because it was none other than Ye Tian who shot at him!

"Golden Silk Holy Technique, Slash!"

A golden thread tore through and slashed at the Son of Annihilation.

If there was no domain weapon and secret treasure protection, the Holy Son of Annihilation would be killed instantly.

But with the help of the domain weapon and the secret treasure, he blocked the blow, but he was only hit hard.

"The Blessed !! of the Dark Sanctuary"

The Son of Desolation recognized it.

The other party is using a holy skill, and the aura is different from the genius of the Dark Destruction Domain, this is undoubtedly the Holy Endowment of the Dark Sacred Domain!

"Run!"

The Holy Son of Annihilation was instigated, even if it was the ancestral medicine not far away, he didn't want it.

Compared to life, what is a mere ancestral medicine!

And at this time, Ye Tian also knew that he had to go all out to easily kill the Holy Son of Annihilation.

This is not the Battle Realm Tower, when the Battle Realm Tower, he can easily kill a Holy Son like the Yongyuan Holy Son in an instant, but at that time, they didn't have secret treasures, domain weapons, and holy relics to protect themselves, and once they had, it would be difficult to kill them.

"Eternal and Immortal Holy Communion!

"Yutian, open!"

"Golden Silk Holy Silk, slash!"

With such an almost full force explosion, Ye Tian slashed it with one blow.

The power of the Golden Silk Holy Technique passed through the defensive domain weapon and the secret treasure of the Holy Son of Annihilation, and only a very small part of the power penetrated into his body, but this small part of the energy was still not something that the Holy Son of Annihilation could compete.

Burst!!!

The body of the Son of Annihilation was annihilated, and all his life and soul were dissipated.

The Son of Desolation is dead!

Immediately, Ye Tian took away the body of the Holy Son of Annihilation, and then took away the ancestral medicine.

In this process, none of the surrounding Destruction Saint Clan and Evil Clan geniuses dared to approach Ye Tian.

Even the Holy Son of Desolation has been killed, where do they dare to approach and seek death?

After taking the ancestral medicine, Ye Tian quickly left here.

At this time, the geniuses of the Destruction Saint Clan and the Evil Clan here had a heated discussion.

"Is this a genius from the Dark Sanctuary, this is too terrifying!"

"Oh my God, even the Holy Son of Annihilation was quickly killed by the other party, it is not an exaggeration to say that he was killed in an instant, can we Saints of the Dark Destruction Domain do it?"

"How do we know what the strength of the Holy Endowment is, but we must be able to do it!"

"It's a good thing this man didn't kill us, otherwise we would have died!"

"Where does he dare to kill us, in that case, it will be a waste of time, and he probably doesn't want to be surrounded by the Holy Endowment!"

Just when the geniuses of the evil clan were talking, three figures descended together.

Seeing these three people, many evil geniuses were respectful, for fear of angering these three people and causing them to be killed.

They were none other than the three Saints of the Destruction of the Holy Race.
